title: Blog - npmx
description: a fast, modern browser for the npm registry

items.content_html: Today we're releasing npmx 0.8 – including a new command palette and a lot of other features.
items.title: npmx 0.8: npm at your fingertips

items.content_html: Today we're releasing the alpha of npmx.dev – a fast, modern browser for the npm registry, built in the open by a growing community.
items.title: Announcing npmx: a fast, modern browser for the npm registry
